nodes.label: Agenda Screen — Calendar Connected with Coach Suggestions
nodes.description: Full Agenda screen dated 'HOY, DOM 3 MAY' with '12 eventos · 3 pendientes' badge. Two COACH MENTEX suggestion cards: (1) 'Ventana de enfoque · 16:00' — 90 min libres, actions 'Reservar bloque' / 'Ahora no'; (2) 'Cierre reflexivo · 21:30' — 5 min reflexión, actions 'Activar' / 'Saltar hoy'. TIMELINE DEL DÍA section shows '5 MENTEX · 7 CALENDAR' events and Google Calendar connected (sincronizado) with Desconectar button. Timeline events: Daily standup 9:00 (Reunión), Respira y vuelve a ti 9:15 (Enfoque), Sesión de diseño 10:30 (Reunión), Café con María 12:30 (Personal), Almuerzo + caminata 1:30 (Pausa), Lectura del día (partial).

coach_suggestion_cards.title: Ventana de enfoque
coach_suggestion_cards.description: 90 min libres entre el review y el gym

coach_suggestion_cards.title: Cierre reflexivo
coach_suggestion_cards.description: 5 minutos para reflexionar sobre tu jornada

nodes.label: Google Calendar Integration — Agenda Sync
nodes.description: Google Calendar shown as connected/sincronizado in the Agenda screen timeline. Green dot indicates active sync. 'Desconectar' button available. Timeline merges 5 Mentex-native events with 7 Google Calendar events into a unified day view.

nodes.label: Coach Mentex Suggestion Card Pattern
nodes.description: Reusable UI pattern: COACH MENTEX labelled card with emoji icon, event title + time, description text, and two action buttons (primary filled + secondary ghost). Used for proactive AI coach suggestions embedded in the Agenda screen.

properties.label: COACH MENTEX
properties.structure: icon + title + time + description + primary_CTA + secondary_CTA
